title: Formal Request for Computer Technology Package
body:
Date: {{date}}

To: Assigned Vocational Rehabilitation Counselor (VRC)
VA Regional Office

Subject: Formal Request for Computer Technology Package (38 C.F.R. § 21.212)
Veteran: [Your Name]
Case Status Stage: {{stage}}

Dear Counselor,

Please accept this letter as a formal, written request for authorization of a computer technology package required to pursue my approved rehabilitation plan in {{programName}}.

Under 38 C.F.R. § 21.212 and § 21.220, the Department of Veterans Affairs should authorize necessary supplies, including computer technology packages, when:
1. The school requires such supplies for all students in the program (School Required: {{schoolRequired}}), or
2. The supplies are necessary to mitigate my disability limitations (Disability Necessity: {{disabilityNeed}}), or
3. Lacking these supplies would place me at a distinct disadvantage compared to non-disabled peers.

Chapter 31 is not governed by the Chapter 33 book-stipend cap, but supplies still require VA authorization under the necessity standard. Any verbal assertion of flat annual dollar limits contradicts controlling regulations.

If this request is denied, please provide a formal written decision notice on VA Form 20-0998 explaining the legal basis and reasons for your decision, as required by 38 U.S.C. § 5104(b).

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
